leadText: The Forage Bag (Japanese: ざいりょうぶくろ Ingredient Bag) is a Key Item introduced in Generation VII. It is used to store items collected in the course of Mallow's trial in Lush Jungle.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Stores items collected in the course of Mallow 's trial in Lush Jungle .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V A bag to carry ingredients gathered during Mallow's trial in the jungle.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] Mallow's schoolbag in Pokémon the Series: Sun & Moon In Pokémon the Series: Sun & Moon , Mallow 's schoolbag is based on the Forage Bag.
